sections.paragraph: f. image, form, appearance. Isa 2:16, כָּל־שְׂכִיֹּות הַחֶמְדָּה, well rendered in the Vulg. omne quod visu pulchrum est; in which phrase all the things which, verse -1316 , had been separately enumerated, are again summed up. [“flag of a ship, standard; compare Samarit. Act 10:1-48 Act 7:1-60
